content: Hey, I'm Finley. I'm a startup founder and I love woodworking and 3D printing in my free time. I'm actually working on a new project to create custom phone cases using 3D printing.
That sounds like a really cool project! What inspired you to get into woodworking and 3D printing?

I've always been into DIY projects and making things with my hands. I actually learned how to woodwork from my grandfather, who was a carpenter. He taught me how to make furniture and other wooden items when I was a kid.
That's amazing. It's great that you have a strong foundation in woodworking. How do you balance your time between working on your startup and pursuing your hobbies?

It can be tough, but I try to make time for my hobbies on the weekends or in the evenings. I usually work on my startup during the day and then switch to my hobbies at night. My team, including my co-founder, Rachel, has been really understanding and supportive of my hobbies.
That's great. It's important to have a support system. What kind of woodworking projects do you like to work on?

I love making furniture and decorative items. I've made a few tables and chairs, and I'm currently working on a custom desk for my home office. I've also been experimenting with origami and incorporating it into my woodworking projects.
That sounds like a great way to express your creativity. Have you ever thought about selling your woodworking projects or offering custom commissions?

Actually, I've been thinking about starting an Etsy shop or selling my projects online. I've been doing some research and talking to other makers in the community, including my friend, Alex, who has a successful Etsy shop.
That's a great idea! There are so many people looking for unique, handmade items. What kind of 3D printing projects do you like to work on?

I love making custom phone cases and other small items. I've also been experimenting with making custom jewelry and decorative items. I've been using a Prusa i3 printer and I'm really happy with the results.
That's really cool. 3D printing can be so versatile and fun. Maybe I can help you find some new 3D printing communities or resources to check out?

Yeah, that would be great. I'm always looking for new inspiration and ideas. I've been taking care of my aging parents, who live with me, and it's been a challenge to balance my time between work and family responsibilities.
I can imagine. It's great that you're prioritizing your family responsibilities. Maybe I can help you find some resources or support groups for caregivers in Lisbon?
That would be really helpful, thank you. I've been feeling a bit overwhelmed lately and it's hard to find time for myself. But I'm trying to stay positive and focus on my hobbies and work.
It's great that you're staying positive and prioritizing your well-being. Remember to take care of yourself too, okay?
